---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new for Floorplanify
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What's the idea? / Kva er ideen?

Describe the feature in one or two paragraphs.

## Why is it useful? / Kvifor er det nyttig?

Who benefits and how? What workflow does it unblock or improve?

## Rough sketch / Skisse

ASCII, mock-up, links to other tools that do it well — anything that
helps convey the intent.

## Constraints to keep in mind / Avgrensingar

- Single-file, no build step
- No external dependencies
- Must keep Norwegian UI
- The on-screen render and the print/SVG export should look the same
